# 清云AI · OpenClaw 专题

> Free 7-day tutorial to master OpenClaw — build your own AI personal assistant.

## About

清云AI · OpenClaw 专题是面向 OpenClaw（原 Clawdbot/Moltbot）的系统化学习站点，提供 7 天入门路径、资源库与社区入口。

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/): Overview and course introduction
- [Day 1: Meet OpenClaw](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/day/1)
- [Day 2: Installation](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/day/2)
- [Day 3: Give Your Assistant a Soul](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/day/3)
- [Day 4: Connect Your Digital Life](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/day/4)
- [Day 5: Skills Ecosystem](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/day/5)
- [Day 6: Automation & Heartbeat](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/day/6)
- [Day 7: Advanced Techniques](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/day/7)
- [Resources](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/resources)
- [English Home](https://qingyun.ai/openclaw/en)

## FAQ

- Q: What is OpenClaw?
  A: OpenClaw is an open-source AI agent framework that lets you build a self-hosted personal AI assistant. It connects to services like Telegram, Gmail, and browsers, can execute code, and automate workflows.

- Q: Is OpenClaw free?
  A: Yes. The framework is open-source; you only pay for model APIs and hosting.

- Q: What AI models does OpenClaw support?
  A: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, Grok, and OpenRouter-compatible models.

- Q: What can an OpenClaw assistant do?
  A: Manage email/calendar, browse the web, execute code, and automate tasks through skills.
